title: angraecoides scalariformis
intro: Angraecoides scalariformis, also known as the "Sword Lily" or "Angraecum", is a species of flowering plant in the orchid family. It has been traditionally used in African medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antimalarial properties. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of Angraecoides scalariformis are typically made by boiling the roots and leaves in water or using them in traditional medicine blends, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
